title: Supported countries and regions \ Anthropic
markdown:
# Supported countries & regions
Commercial API access and Claude.ai.
To the extent permitted by law, Anthropic reserves the right to not provide its products or services to entities whose majority direct or indirect ownership is attributable to nations other than those listed in our Supported Regions Policy.

metadata.title: Supported countries and regions \ Anthropic
metadata.description: Anthropic is an AI safety and research company that's working to build reliable, interpretable, and steerable AI systems.
